0: a person raises a brush to their head then moves the brush through their hair repeatedly
3: a person raises both hands then brings the palms together to clap
8: a person moves forward with a ball then bounces the ball repeatedly on the ground to dribble
20: a person sits on a horse then moves with the horse as it walks or runs
23: a person lies down on their back then curls the body upward in a situp
